name: Anatomy Basics
description: Fundamental anatomy covering major body systems and structures

items.location: Mediastinum, between lungs, slightly left of center
items.function: Pumps blood throughout the body; receives deoxygenated blood from body and pumps to lungs; receives oxygenated blood from lungs and pumps to body

items.location: Arises from left ventricle, descends through thorax and abdomen
items.function: Main artery distributing oxygenated blood to all body tissues

items.location: Upper right mediastinum, drains into right atrium
items.function: Returns deoxygenated blood from upper body to heart

items.location: Lower right mediastinum, drains into right atrium
items.function: Returns deoxygenated blood from lower body to heart

items.location: Arise from right ventricle, branch to each lung
items.function: Carry deoxygenated blood from heart to lungs for oxygenation

items.location: On surface of heart muscle
items.function: Supply oxygenated blood to heart muscle itself

items.location: Thoracic cavity, separated by mediastinum
items.function: Gas exchange - oxygen in, carbon dioxide out; right lung has 3 lobes, left has 2
items.clinical_significance: Pneumonia, COPD, lung cancer, pulmonary embolism

items.location: Anterior neck, extends from larynx to carina
items.function: Air passage to lungs; lined with cilia to trap and expel particles

items.location: Branch from trachea at carina, subdivide into bronchioles
items.function: Conduct air to and from alveoli for gas exchange

items.location: Terminal ends of bronchioles in lungs
items.function: Primary site of gas exchange between air and blood

items.location: Dome-shaped muscle between thoracic and abdominal cavities
items.function: Main muscle of respiration; contracts during inspiration

items.location: Cranial cavity, protected by skull
items.function: Control center for all body functions; thought, memory, emotion, movement
items.clinical_significance: Stroke, traumatic brain injury, dementia, tumors

items.location: Largest part of brain, divided into hemispheres
items.function: Higher cognitive functions, voluntary movement, sensory processing

items.location: Posterior inferior brain
items.function: Coordination, balance, fine motor control

items.location: Between cerebrum and spinal cord
items.function: Vital functions: breathing, heart rate, consciousness; cranial nerve nuclei

items.location: Vertebral canal, extends from brainstem to L1-L2
items.function: Conduit for signals between brain and body; reflex arcs
items.clinical_significance: Spinal cord injury, myelopathy, cord compression

items.location: Cover brain and spinal cord (dura, arachnoid, pia mater)
items.function: Protect and nourish central nervous system

items.location: Left upper abdomen, below diaphragm
items.function: Mechanical and chemical digestion; produces acid and enzymes; stores food
items.clinical_significance: Gastritis, peptic ulcer disease, gastric cancer

items.location: Central abdomen, extends from stomach to colon
items.function: Primary site of nutrient absorption; duodenum, jejunum, ileum

items.location: Right upper abdomen, below diaphragm
items.function: Detoxification, protein synthesis, bile production, glucose storage

items.location: Inferior surface of liver
items.function: Stores and concentrates bile for fat digestion

items.location: Retroperitoneal, behind stomach
items.function: Exocrine: digestive enzymes; Endocrine: insulin and glucagon

items.location: Frames abdomen from cecum to rectum
items.function: Water absorption, formation of feces, houses gut microbiome

items.location: Retroperitoneal, either side of spine at T12-L3
items.function: Filter blood, produce urine, regulate electrolytes and blood pressure
items.clinical_significance: Chronic kidney disease, acute kidney injury, nephrolithiasis

items.location: Retroperitoneal, from kidneys to bladder
items.function: Transport urine from kidneys to bladder via peristalsis

items.location: Pelvic cavity, behind pubic symphysis
items.function: Store and expel urine; capacity ~400-600mL

items.location: Functional unit within kidney
items.function: Filter blood, reabsorb nutrients, concentrate urine
